query: UPDATE auditRequests SET unsubscribeToken = CONCAT(MD5(CONCAT(id, email, RAND())), MD5(CONCAT(businessName, createdAt, RAND()))) WHERE unsubscribeToken IS NULL;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2YqCD9WReZAoX2r.26b4721beed0 --database TXsqXLVXpGbQzymBp4kwfQ --execute UPDATE auditRequests SET unsubscribeToken = CONCAT(MD5(CONCAT(id, email, RAND())), MD5(CONCAT(businessName, createdAt, RAND()))) WHERE unsubscribeToken IS NULL;
